extracted.title: VARIODYN ONE Digital Call Station DCS plus / DKM plus
extracted.description: The VARIODYN ONE Digital Call Station DCS plus allows selection of loudspeaker circuits, transmission of voice announcements, gongs, and alarms. It connects via standard CAT5 cable to the VARIODYN ONE INC-D control device, supporting up to four simultaneous audio signals. Connection can be redundant, up to 300m via CAT5 or 20km via fibre-optic cabling. The DCS plus can be expanded with up to six DKM plus digital keyboard modules (PN 583526), providing up to 120 keys and LEDs per station. The microphone and cable connection are permanently monitored. It includes an external audio input/output for connecting devices like CD players. Features include 12 freely configurable keys with independent programmable LEDs, a built-in loudspeaker, and an electret gooseneck microphone. It is designed for high failure safety and cost-effective CAT5 cabling, and can be fitted into a desk surface.

product_models.name: Digital Call Station DCS plus
product_models.features: 12 freely configurable keys (with LEDs), 2 LEDs, 1 microphone, 1 loudspeaker, 1 external audio input, 1 external audio output

specs.expandability: Up to six DKM plus digital keyboard modules

extracted.title: LCD80 Mimic Annunciator
extracted.description: The Honeywell LCD-80 is an 80-character, backlit Liquid Crystal Display (LCD) annunciator designed for use with Honeywell BC200 fire indicator panels (FIP). Up to 32 LCD-80 units can be connected onto a two-wire distributed ring. It operates in two primary modes: "Terminal" and "Annunciator" mode. Common features include an 80-character backlit LCD (20 characters x 4 lines), time and date display, and the ability to be remotely located up to 1000 metres from the control panel. It features a mutable local piezo sounder with alarm/fault/isolate resound and offers flush or surface mount options. The device utilizes an EIA-485 interface, supporting up to 32 units per FIP. In Terminal mode, the LCD-80 mimics the BC200 display, showing time, date, events, device type identifiers, and alarm/fault/isolate counts, with individual and scroll buttons for events and a mute function for the internal sounder. In Annunciator mode, it functions as a remote alphanumeric display module, showing up to 64 pre-programmed messages (60 characters each) activated by script events in the FIP, with scroll functionality for viewing multiple active messages.

specs.Display Type: 80-character backlit Liquid Crystal Display (20 characters x 4 lines)

extracted.title: Embodied Carbon Calculator: Basic Report for M200E-SMB
extracted.description: This report provides an embodied carbon calculation for the Notifier M200E-SMB Control Panel, utilizing the CIBSE TM65 Digital Tool. It details material extraction, product service life, and embodied carbon results, showing a total embodied carbon of 17 kgCO2e.

extracted.title: NVIDIA Quadro P400 Professional Graphics Card
extracted.description: The NVIDIA Quadro P400 combines a 256 CUDA core Pascal GPU, 2 GB of ultra-fast GDDR5 memory, and advanced display technologies to deliver great performance for a range of professional applications. Its single-slot, low-profile form factor makes it compatible with even the most space and power-constrained chassis. It supports up to three 4K displays (4096x2160 @ 60Hz) with HDR color, providing a wide visual workspace for high-resolution viewing. Quadro cards are certified with a broad range of sophisticated professional applications, tested by leading workstation manufacturers, and backed by a global team of support specialists.

specs.form_factor: 2.713" H x 5.7" L, Single Slot, Low Profile
features: Dedicated hardware video encode and decode engines³

extracted.title: Bilsom 304L Foamplug (Corded)
extracted.description: The Bilsom 300 Series earplugs are ideal for workers who need to block out loud noise and demand the best protection and comfort available in an earplug. Europe's most-used polyurethane earplug, the 300 series earplug, offers superior noise-blocking performance in a single-use earplug. Made of POLYURETHANE FOAM, it delivers superior long-wearing comfort and solid performance. Features a SMOOTH, SOIL-RESISTANT SKIN that prevents dirt or other substances from accumulating on skin or entering the ear canal. Designed for single-use.

extracted.title: Style Variant 29011 LED CG-S Rettungszeichenleuchte
extracted.description: Einseitig abstrahlende LED Rettungszeichenleuchte aus hochwertigem, UV-beständigem und halogenfreiem Kunststoff in LED-Technologie. Sie bietet eine große Auswahl an Siebdruck-Piktogrammscheiben mit einfacher Schnappmontage. Der Wartungsaufwand ist minimiert durch eine hohe Lebensdauererwartung der LEDs von bis zu 50.000 Stunden und verkürzten Inspektionsaufwand durch CEWA GUARD Technologie. Sie ermöglicht automatische Funktionsüberwachung von bis zu 20 Leuchten pro Stromkreis und reduzierte Installationskosten durch STAR-Technologie. Ein frei programmierbarer Mischbetrieb der Schaltungsarten pro Leuchte in einem Stromkreis ist möglich.

specs.function_monitoring: Automatic, up to 20 luminaires per circuit

extracted.title: IPS/S3.1.1 IP Interface, MDRC
extracted.description: The ABB IPS/S3.1.1 is a DIN-rail mountable IP interface that connects the KNX bus with an Ethernet network using the KNXnet/IP protocol for tunneling. It enables programming of KNX devices via LAN using ETS, offers 5 tunneling servers, supports fixed or DHCP IP addresses, and can be powered by 12-30 V DC or Power over Ethernet (PoE).

extracted.title: Optical smoke detector IQ8Quad with isolator
extracted.description: Optical smoke detector which works using the light scatter principle to guarantee safe and early detection of fire. Responds well to slow-burning, smouldering fires. Intelligent fire detector with decentralized intelligence, automatic function self-test, CPU failure mode, alarm and operating data memory, alarm indicator, soft-addressing and operating indication. The detector is provided with an integrated isolator. A remote indicator can be connected.

specs.ip_rating: IP40 (with base), up to IP43 (with base and option)

accessories.description: Detector base with relay contact for IQ8Quad

extracted.title: Loop LED remote indicator panel for 32 messages
extracted.description: Same as 764790, but with integrated and wired esserbus transponder 32 LEDs for operation as a remote indicating panel for the esserbus. For connection to the esserbus and powered loop in fire alarm systems 8000 and IQ8Control. Isolator (Part No. 788612) not included, please order separately. This indicator panel is not suitable for application as an initial warning device for the fire brigade.

specs.alarm_current: approx. 380 mA @ 12 V DC (incl. 32 LED & buzzer)
specs.color: white (similar to RAL 9003), front blue (similar to RAL 5003)

extracted.title: IQ8MCP electronic module with isolator
extracted.description: Addressable electronic module suitable for use in the esserbus and powered loop with alarm latch and alarm indicator. Optional connection for conventional MCP. Without BUS connection, the detector operates as conventional MCP. Built-in loop isolator in the manual call point. An external detector zone (D-line) could be connected with up to ten conventional manual call points (internal Alarm resistor for each detector 1 KOhm) - e.g. Part No. 804900 or 804901 to this IQ8 manual call point model and configure required operation with tools 8000. When an alarm is triggered the address and the programmed additional text of the MCP IQ8 to which the conventional zone is connected are displayed automatically. Cable length of the D-line max. 500 meters! Features include: Slimline design, Low power consumption, Plug-in connection clamps, Optional terminal clamps, 2 x cable entries on top, at the bottom and on the rear panel, Fixing on standard flush mounted installation box, Test function via manual call point service key, Detectors that are not ready for operation can be marked with the "Out of order" label by reversing the enclosed operating front foil. Note: For a LARGE MCP, you have to order the electronic module and the MCP housing separately to have a complete MCP.
extracted.category: Electronic module for Manual Call Point

extracted.title: esserbus transponder 12 relays (8 bit)
extracted.description: The esserbus transponder works as a loop device on the multi-functional primary line. With the 12 relays module, it is possible to expand the number of control zones per control unit. Depending on the control unit, it can be integrated or used with fire detectors in mixed operation. The esserbus transponder can be optionally extended by adding the additional isolator board Part No. 788612. esserbus transponder voltage supply: via the multi-functional primary line. The esserbus transponder can be wired with an external switching voltage of 12V DC or 24V DC for the K1 to K12 relays. The external voltage supply of the transponder can be programmed to be monitored in the customer data in the operating mode. In the "floating" operating mode, no external switching voltage of the relays is necessary. 11 relays are freely programmable. The maximum line length from the transponder to the external device is up to 1000 m.

specs.contact_load_relay: 30 V DC / 1 A (max. 3 A each transponder)
features: Only one loop address is needed per transponder
specs.monitoring: No monitored control according to EN 54 possible

extracted.title: BW™ Clip4
extracted.description: The Honeywell BW™ Clip4 is a wearable, always-on four-gas detector designed for hassle-free operation with a 2-year continuous runtime, requiring no charging or battery or sensor replacements. It detects Hydrogen Sulfide (H2S), Carbon Monoxide (CO), Oxygen (O2), and Combustible Gases (LEL), offering dependable functionality, streamlined management with IntelliDoX, and compliance alerts.

specs.alarms: Visual, vibrating, audible (95 dB); Low, High, TWA, STEL, OL (over limit)
specs.self_test: Activated detectors automatically perform one internal diagnostic test every 24 hours (sensors, battery, and circuitry).
user_options: Adjust STEL period (5-15 minutes in 1 minute intervals)
Select combustible gases measurement: 0-100% LEL (Lower Explosive Limit) or Methane gas 0-5.0% v/v
Calibration due date (1 to 365 days, or set to zero for off)
specs.warranty: Full two-year warranty including sensors and battery
specs.notes: The LED IR combustible gas sensor used in Honeywell BW™ Clip4 cannot detect certain combustible gases including hydrogen and acetylene. The application should be reviewed to ensure adequate detection.

comfortable_fit: Durable, ergonomic and wearable - doesn't weigh you down
Compact profile - even working in tight spaces, you won't know you are wearing it
simpler_operation: Tamper-proof operation with just one button
Real-time gas concentrations shown on LCD
compliance_alerts: Flashing red non-compliance indicators warn workers that the detector has not been bump tested according to schedule
Daily full function self-test of sensors, battery status, circuit integrity, and audible/visual alarms
streamlined_management: Compatible with IntelliDoX docking system and instrument management system
dependable_functionality: Tested to last in extreme environments
